feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 89 year old Ridley Scott will never direct another Alien
entry.content: >Ridley Scott Plans ‘Treasure Island’ Remake, WWI Drama and Western After ‘The Dog Stars’ >The original Treasure Island films, with greatest, deepest respect, were terrible, and were always made for kids, with a lot of ‘arrghh me hearties’ and eating the fucking scenery. This is not going to be like that. It’s a much subtler version. >my western "Freewalkers" is a "f***ing savage" Western based on an unproduced screenplay by "a very good author" who passed away during the Covid pandemic. [It's a

entry.title: /int/ International: please explain, i'm retarded
entry.content: >the rockets' red glare >the bombs bursting in air what the hell? i mean, i don't know when that anthem was written, but SURELY rockets & bombs that "burst" in the sky (implying they were deployed from an aircraft of kind, which didn't even exist until well into the 20th century, and calling normal artillery "bombs" just seems off) didn't really exist at the time????

entry.title: /int/ International: Every 4th of July my father and brother drive around Virginia in their pickup tr…
entry.content: Every 4th of July my father and brother drive around Virginia in their pickup truck with baseball bats through residential neighborhoods. If they hear anybody speaking a language other than English or speaking in a foreign accent they will jump out the the truck and beat them with the bats and drive off. They've been to jail for this multiple times but refuse to stop. They call it a 'tradition' going back generations.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Alright, /b/, you guys are my only hope: It appears that Applicant for Death (an…
entry.content: Alright, /b/, you guys are my only hope: It appears that Applicant for Death (an eroguro doujinshi by Gotoh Juan) has been taken down from ExHentai. (....yeah, there was apparently a real-life crime in Vietnam based on that doujinshi, but I was still able to find it more than a year after said crime had taken place.) I was hoping to reread it, but other sites only have it in languages such as Italian. Would any of you happen to know where I can still find the English translation? Or even just mo

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why Christianity Fails Morally
entry.content: Because it fails to define good and evil. Aristotle defined goodness as that which aligns with human flourishing—the pursuit of ultimate happiness, or *eudaimonia*: living a life of purpose, meaning, and rational activity in accordance with virtue, rather than simply chasing temporary pleasure. Conversely, as Augustine noted, evil is not necessarily the opposite of goodness; rather, it is the absence or deficiency of goodness, or a separation from it. This means that being good requires active p

entry.content: >"CAT BATH" Edition /ACT/ is a weekly Caturday thread dedicated to cats and other felines. Calling all artists and writers: Feel free to post your art, stories, and WIPs! Whether it's just doodles, smut art, or full-blown anthro stories/greentexts, all are welcome to share and critique. Let the Caturday festivities begin! Drop your favorite cat pics, comics, and game recs below! >Alpha Lexa Greens: https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/ folders/1Og2_VSZpZntiOqNK85_ANkFME- f77LsF?sort=13&direction=a

entry.title: /g/ Technology: uninstall kde now or you will get hacked!
entry.content: kde has a MAJOR bug that lets anyone run programs, scripts, malware, etc with full system access. >April 1 2026, 23:51 The first email was sent to security@kde.org >July 2 2026, 18:30 The exploit has exceeded a waiting period of 90 days whilst still active, so we proceed to publication. https://blog.kimiblock.top/2026/07/ 01/arbitrary-code-execution-in-kde- plasma/

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: What's even the purpose behind bothering to make a girlfriend?
entry.content: Why even bother to make one? You cant expect her to cook while you earn. You cant expect her to look after the kids (that is assuming if she even chooses motherhood in the first place). You cant share your emotions with her, she will take you as a weakling and a cuck and will delete whatever respect remained in her mind regarding your strength. You cant expect her to loyal & not cheat. The entire legal system and socio-political climate is ready to support her in case she betrays you. What else

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PlayBSD
entry.content: The Technical Feasibility of a BSD-Based PlayStation Compatibility OS The technical feasibility of creating a custom, open-source operating system to natively run PlayStation 4 software on standard PC hardware is a fascinating thought experiment that sits squarely at the intersection of kernel development and reverse engineering. The foundation of this concept is fundamentally sound: the PlayStation 4's native operating system, known internally as Orbis OS, is not a built-from-scratch proprietar

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #355
entry.content: Blacked capes Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha wai

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >"A man does something, it's 'strategic'; a woman does the same thing, it's 'cal…

I have never in my life perceived the word "calculated" to be negative. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Fable 2
entry.content: Just wasted a few minutes of my life checking out the gameplay trailer for this game. And HOLY FUCK guys. One of the first fucking things I hear an NPC utter is: "I don't deal with randos" Writing style is so hilariously bad in this game I thought I was being pranked. Whichever redditor was in charge absolutely should not quit their day job. Find a new profession altogether while you're at it, writing is just not it. There is a genuine, concerning lack of vision here, and I'm sure that extends e
